skills.name: Acid Rain
skills.description:
Creates acidic clouds that
pour down acid rain on enemies.

skills.name: Air Blade
skills.description: Sends out sharp blades of air in a fan shape.

skills.name: Air Cannon
skills.description: Quickly fires a burst of highly pressurized air.

skills.name: Apocalypse
skills.description: Generates several dark vortexes around the enemy.

skills.name: Hydro Jet
skills.description:
Hurls a high speed ball of water
at an enemy.

skills.name: Beam Slicer
skills.description:
Mows down the area in front with a beam imbued with dragon power.
The area struck by the beam will also explode after a short delay.

skills.name: Blast Cannon
skills.description:
Fires an energy bullet imbued with dragon power at the enemy's location.
Upon impact, the bullet shatters and creates a frontal long-range explosion.

skills.name: Iceberg
skills.description:
Summons a sharp ice lance
under an enemy.

skills.name: Bubble Blast
skills.description:
Fires numerous bubbles
that slowly pursue an enemy.

skills.name: Poison Shower
skills.description: Focuses energy into the body and scatters poison orbs in all directions.

skills.name: Charge Cannon
skills.description:
Fires an energy orb infused with draconic power at the enemy. 
The orb causes a wide-area explosion upon impact.

skills.name: Comet Strike
skills.description:
Drops a meteorite straight down,
generating a shock wave around the impact area.

skills.name: Meteorain
skills.description:
Drops countless meteorites,
generating an array of shock waves.

skills.name: Creeping Bubbles
skills.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Generates a multitude of bubbles around the enemy to surround and attack them.

skills.name: Crosswind
skills.description: Conjures blades of wind in front of the enemy, converging to deliver a cutting cross attack.

skills.name: Dark Arrow
skills.description:
Fires off dark energy
that homes in on an enemy.

skills.name: Dark Ball
skills.description:
Unleashes a sphere of darkness 
that slowly tracks down an enemy.

skills.name: Dark Cannon
skills.description:
Hurls an energy ball imbued
with dark energy at an enemy.

skills.name: Dark Laser
skills.description:
Charges dark energy before
blasting enemies with a powerful beam.

skills.name: Dark Whisp
skills.description: Fires a menacing ball of dark energy that pursues enemies.

skills.name: Umbral Surge
skills.description:
Fires high-speed dark orbs in a fan shape, 
spreading as they travel.

skills.name: Shadow Burst
skills.description:
Quickly discharges dark energy,
damaging those around it.

skills.name: Diamond Rain
skills.description:
Creates numerous lumps of ice that are
consecutively dropped on a foe's head.

skills.name: Torrential Blast
skills.description:
Fires a high-pressure stream of water forward.
After a short delay, the stream branches off to the left and right.

skills.name: Double Blizzard Spike
skills.description:
Creates two huge ice blocks
and fires them at the enemy one after another.
On impact, it also shocks those close by.

skills.name: Dragon Breath
skills.description:
Exhales breath imbued with draconic energy,
dealing continuous damage to those in front of it.

skills.name: Dragon Cannon
skills.description:
Hurls an energy ball imbued
with draconic energy at an enemy.

skills.name: Dragon Meteor
skills.description:
Summons numerous small meteorites
and launches them at an enemy.

skills.name: Dragon Burst
skills.description:
Quickly discharges draconic energy,
damaging those around it.

skills.name: Shockwave
skills.description:
Quickly discharges electricity,
shocking those around it.

skills.name: Volcanic Rain
skills.description:
Fires countless volcanic bombs into the sky.
After a while, the bombs rain down around their originator.

skills.name: Fire Ball
skills.description:
Creates a giant ball of flame and hurls it at an enemy.
The ball explodes over a wide area upon impact.

skills.name: Ignis Blast
skills.description:
Hurls a ball of fire 
straight at an enemy.

skills.name: Spirit Fire
skills.description:
Shoots fireballs towards an enemy. 
The fireballs explode after a short distance, 
generating smaller fireballs that spread forward.

skills.name: Flame Funnel
skills.description:
Creates multiple spheres of fiery energy,
from which countless fireballs shoot towards the enemy.

skills.name: Ignis Breath
skills.description:
Shoots flames at an enemy,
dealing continuous damage.

skills.name: Flame Wall
skills.description:
Creates a wall of flames at the enemy's location.
The wall of flames will remain for a while,
and deal damage to the enemies it touches.

skills.name: Flare Arrow
skills.description:
Fires three flaming arrows in succession
that home in on an enemy.

skills.name: Flare Storm
skills.description:
Generates two flaming tornadoes on either side 
before launching them at an enemy.

skills.name: Crystal Breath
skills.description:
Enshrouds an enemy in a frigid blast of air,
dealing continuous damage.

skills.name: Spirit Flame
skills.description:
Fires three balls of malice
that relentlessly pursue an enemy.

skills.name: Grass Tornado
skills.description:
Generates two tornadoes on either side 
before launching them at an enemy.

skills.name: Dark Shot
skills.description:
Fires a dark energy projectile
that accelerates over time.

skills.name: Holy Burst
skills.description:
Creates a wide explosion of light
at the enemy's location and around it.

skills.name: Punch
skills.description: Punch with conviction; believe in the power of the fist.

skills.name: Hydro Laser
skills.description:
Shoots pressurized water at extreme velocities,
sweeping over a wide area in front of it.

skills.name: Hydro Slicer
skills.description:
Mows down the frontal area with a blast of compressed water.
The area struck by the blast erupts with water after a short delay.

skills.name: Pal Blast
skills.description:
Charges destructive energy before firing
a high-powered beam forward across a wide area.

skills.name: Absolute Frost
skills.description: Throws icicles in a wide area from under the enemy's feet.

skills.name: Icicle Cutter
skills.description:
Creates a crescent blade of ice
and hurls it forward.

skills.name: Ice Missile
skills.description:
Creates ice lances in the air
that fly towards enemies.

skills.name: Freeze Wall
skills.description:
Creates a wall of ice that rises from the ground.
The ice wall remains standing for a while,
and breaks after taking enough damage.

skills.name: Icicle Line
skills.description: Generates pillars of ice that move in a straight line in three directions.

skills.name: Icicle Bullet
skills.description:
Generates multiple sharp ice blocks in the sky
and fires them at the enemy.

skills.name: Blizzard Spike
skills.description:
Creates a giant lump of ice and hurls it at an enemy.
It deals damage to those in the surrounding area upon impact.

skills.name: Ignis Rage
skills.description:
Infuses the surrounding ground with energy, 
causing it to explode after a set amount of time.

skills.name: Lightning Strike
skills.description:
Acts as a lightning rod, calling down thunderbolts
that electrocute the surrounding area.

skills.name: Splash
skills.description: Generates a column of water that travels in a straight line.

skills.name: Lightning Streak
skills.description:
Generates a lightning bolt 
that moves forward in a line.

skills.name: Lock-on Laser
skills.description:
Takes aim at an enemy before
firing a super high speed laser.

skills.name: Bog Blast
skills.description:
Hurls sticky mud
at an enemy.

skills.name: Poison Fog
skills.description:
Generates a fog of poison in front, 
causing the opponent to become poisoned.

skills.name: Poison Blast
skills.description:
Hurls poison sludge
at an enemy.

skills.name: Power Bomb
skills.description:
Charges a massive amount of energy
before firing a large destructive ball.

skills.name: Power Shot
skills.description:
Charges energy
into a focused blast.

skills.name: Psycho Gravity
skills.description:
Utilizes gravity to deprive enemies of their freedom, 
then slams them into the ground from high above.

skills.name: Radiant Barrage
skills.description:
Unleashes a sphere of light that slowly tracks down an enemy. 
As it nears its target, it splits into countless light bullets that strike all at once.

skills.name: Raid Cutter
skills.description:
Shoots countless wind swords 
that fly straight towards the enemy.

skills.name: Thunder Rail
skills.description:
Charge the power of lightning to the limit
and fires multiple simultaneous electric shocks at the enemy.

skills.name: All Range Thunder
skills.description:
Generates lightning strikes that travel 
in a straight line in all directions.

skills.name: Reflect Leaf
skills.description:
Launches a blade of wind that rebounds off enemies or trees, striking repeatedly.
Can ricochet up to four times.

skills.name: Aqua Surge
skills.description:
Generates waves that surge around the enemy from all sides. 
They converge and explode at the center, erupting into a column of water.

skills.name: Rocky Impact
skills.description: Shakes the ground and lifts a massive boulder into the air.

skills.name: Rock Lance
skills.description:
Generates a sharp rock spear
under an enemy.

skills.name: Spine Vine
skills.description:
Generates spiny thorns that chase an enemy
along the ground, piercing them from below.

skills.name: Circle Vine
skills.description:
Sprouts sharp roots
in and around the enemy's location.

skills.name: Sand Tornado
skills.description:
Generates two sand tornadoes on either side
before launching them at an enemy.

skills.name: Sand Twister
skills.description:
Creates multiple sand tornadoes.
The tornadoes continuously spin in circles.

skills.name: Geyser Gush
skills.description: Erupts massive pillars of water beneath and around the enemy.

skills.name: Seed Machine Gun
skills.description:
Fires a volley of hard seeds
at enemies in front of it.

skills.name: Seed Mine
skills.description:
Launches a deadly seed.
If it hits an enemy, the seed explodes.

skills.name: Implode
skills.description:
Risks its life to cause a violent explosion.
Becomes incapacitated afterwards.

skills.name: Bee Quiet
skills.description:
Risks its life to cause a violent explosion, 
but receives the honor of falling in battle.

skills.name: Megaton Implode
skills.description:
Risks life to cause a massive explosion.
Those who perish for their duty become glistening stars in the night sky.

skills.name: Nightmare Ball
skills.description:
Creates a giant ball of darkness
and hurls it at an enemy.

skills.name: Lethal Laser
skills.description:
After aiming at the enemy,
fires multiple ultra-fast lightning lasers.

skills.name: Solar Blast
skills.description:
Charges solar energy before
blasting enemies with a powerful beam.

skills.name: Multicutter
skills.description:
The user fires three high-speed blades of wind
in quick succession that fly straight at enemies.

skills.name: Spark Blast
skills.description:
Releases lightning orbs in a fan shape, 
spreading as they travel.

skills.name: Star Mine
skills.description:
Generates stars around the enemy that explode on contact.
Stars also explode after some time.

skills.name: Stone Blast
skills.description: Fires a barrage of stones forward.

skills.name: Comet Barrage
skills.description:
Drops meteorites one after another,
generating shock waves around the impact areas.

skills.name: Tri-Lightning
skills.description:
Generates lightning that strikes
an enemy three times from above.

skills.name: Stone Cannon
skills.description:
Digs up a boulder
and hurls it at an enemy.

skills.name: Electric Ball
skills.description:
Fires an electric ball
that slowly pursues an enemy.

skills.name: Lightning Bolt
skills.description:
Charges electric energy before
blasting enemies with a powerful shock.

skills.name: Plasma Funnel
skills.description:
Creates two balls of electric energy
that fire numerous lightning orbs at enemies.

skills.name: Thunder Rain
skills.description:
Calls lightning that strikes an enemy
after a set amount of time has passed.

skills.name: Thunder Spear
skills.description:
Fires a high-speed lightning spear
straight ahead towards the enemy.

skills.name: Thunderstorm
skills.description:
Generates a huge tornado of lightning
that moves slowly towards the enemy.

skills.name: Rockburst
skills.description: Causes the ground to shake before hurling a massive stone mass at its surroundings.

skills.name: TriSpark
skills.description:
A high-speed lightning ball that flies in a straight line.
Simultaneously fires slow lightning balls that track the enemy.

skills.name: Fluffy Tackle
skills.description:
Melpaca's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while surrounded by an adorable aura.

skills.name: Fierce Fang (Fire)
skills.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

skills.name: Double Fang (Fire)
skills.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

skills.name: Fierce Fang (Dark)
skills.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

skills.name: Double Fang (Dark)
skills.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

skills.name: Daring Shadowstorm
skills.description:
Kitsun Noct's exclusive skill.
Charges forward with great speed while enveloped in intense purple flames.

skills.name: Daring Flames
skills.description:
Kitsun's exclusive skill.
Charges forward with great speed while enveloped in intense blue flames.

skills.name: Ground Smash
skills.description:
Anubis' exclusive skill.
Leaps high into the air and strikes a punch to the ground, 
causing a shockwave that deals damge over a wide area.

skills.name: Spinning Roundhouse
skills.description:
Anubis' exclusive skill.
Performs a spin kick with its strong legs, sweeping enemies over a wide area.

skills.name: Forceful Charge
skills.description:
Anubis' exclusive skill.
Rapidly pursues its foes while releasing energy
and unleashing a powerful punch.

skills.name: Nightmare Claw
skills.description:
Incineram Noct's exclusive skill. 
Draws near enemies using its left dark claw to slash them into the air
before cutting them down with its right dark claw.

skills.name: Hellfire Claw
skills.description:
Incineram's exclusive skill.
Draws near enemies using its left claw to slash them into the air
before cutting them down with its right claw.

skills.name: Flame Breath
skills.description:
Vanwyrms exclusive skill.
Advances while breathing fire from its mouth.

skills.name: Tempest Blizzard
skills.description:
Vanwyrm Cryst's exclusive skill.
Advances while exhaling cold air from its mouth.

skills.name: Twin Spears
skills.description:
Necromus' exclusive skill.
Clads its twin spears with vicious whirlwinds and charges forward,
thrusting them one after the other.

skills.name: Divine Disaster
skills.description:
Charges forward, generating orbs of light that automatically target enemies 
and unleash a barrage of lasers.

skills.name: Divine Disaster II
skills.description:
Shadowbeak's exclusive skill. 
As it charges forward, emits countless blue rays that automatically locate and pursue the enemy.

skills.name: Firefist Breathstorm
skills.description:
Astegon's exclusive skill.
After throwing two punches forward, it exhales a dragon breath downward.

skills.name: Fierce Fang (Dark)
skills.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

skills.name: Double Fang (Dark)
skills.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

skills.name: Celestial Vortex
skills.description:
Shaolong's exclusive skill.
Summons a massive vortex reaching into the heavens.
The vortex draws in and eliminates all surrounding enemies at once.

skills.name: Azure Dracoflare
skills.description:
Shaolong's exclusive skill.
Breathes Dragon-elemental flames in a sweeping motion, scorching the surrounding area.

skills.name: Hydra Charge
skills.description:
Shaolong's exclusive skill.
Cloaks the body in water and charges straight forward.

skills.name: Bolt Blink
skills.description:
Azurmane's exclusive skill.
Moves with the speed of lightning, engulfing everything in its path.

skills.name: Flash Charge
skills.description:
Azurmane's exclusive skill.
Cloaks the body in lightning and performs a high-speed charge toward the enemy.

skills.name: Reckless Charge
skills.description:
Rushoar's exclusive skill.
Takes aim at a foe and rushes at them with a fierce charge.

skills.name: Thunderslide
skills.description:
Penking Lux's exclusive skill.
Lies on its belly while generating electric charge all around it
before sliding at enemies at high speed.

skills.name: Emperor Slide
skills.description:
Penking's exclusive skill.
Lies on its belly while generating frozen air all around it
before sliding at enemies at high speed.

skills.name: Chicken Rush
skills.description:
Chikipi's exclusive skill. 
Flies at enemies in its sights, attacking them with its sharp beak.

skills.name: Trickster Show
skills.description:
Dupin's exclusive skill.
Creates two illusions to distract enemies, then launches fire birds from its top hat.

skills.name: Cube Press
skills.description:
Tetroise 's exclusive skill.
Leaps into the air and crushes enemies with its massive weight.

skills.name: Holy Press
skills.description:
Tetroise Primo's exclusive skill.
Leaps into the air and crushes enemies with its massive weight.
Upon landing, light spreads outward, forming pillars of light that burst forth and strike nearby enemies.

skills.name: Fuddler Tunneler
skills.description:
Fuddler's exclusive skill.
Burrows underground and bursts out from beneath enemies.

skills.name: Evil Slash
skills.description:
Xenovader's exclusive skill.
Swiftly pounces and slashes with its left hand.

skills.name: Phantom Peck
skills.description:
Cawgnito's exclusive skill. 
Teleports next to an enemy 
before attacking with its beak.

skills.name: Beam Slash
skills.description:
Xenolord's exclusive skill.
Generates a high-output beam sword with the right hand 
and delivers two powerful slashes while moving at high speed.

skills.name: Astral Ray
skills.description:
Xenolord's exclusive skill.
Concentrates energy filled with darkness and releases it all at once in a straight line.

skills.name: Omega Laser
skills.description:
Xenolord's exclusive skill.
Summons the light of destruction from subspace and continuously fires it in all directions, burning everything in its sight to ashes.

skills.name: Satellite Bit
skills.description:
Xenolord's exclusive skill.
Generates four satellite-like wings with auto-attack functionality. 
These wings will automatically track and attack the enemy when the next attack is launched.

skills.name: Cosmic Meteor
skills.description:
Xenolord's exclusive skill.
Soars into the air at the speed of light and releases countless meteor projectiles. 
Afterwards, transforms into a comet and charges forward, causing a massive explosion upon impact.

skills.name: Jumping Stinger
skills.description:
Menasting's exclusive skill.
Jumps high and forcefully stabs its prey with its tail.
The poison from the tail is deadly.

skills.name: Mud Horn
skills.description:
Eikthyrdeer Terra's exclusive skill.
Charges at foes and uses its antlers to whip mud at them.
When used while riding, the direction of the charge can be controlled.

skills.name: Antler Uppercut
skills.description:
Eikthyrdeer's exclusive skill.
Charges at foes and uses antlers to launch them into the air.
When used while riding, the direction of the charge can be controlled.

skills.name: Missile Burst
skills.description:
Aegidron's exclusive skill.
Launches countless explosive missiles from its wings.

skills.name: Shell Spin
skills.description:
Digtoise's exclusive skill.
Moves while spinning its whole body at high speed.
Drills through enemies, dealing continuous damage.

skills.name: Gale Claw
skills.description:
Galeclaw's exclusive skill.
With talons outstretched, 
it glides forward in a ferocious charge.

skills.name: Lightning Claw
skills.description:
Grizzbolt's exclusive skill.
After leaping at an enemy and tearing at it twice with its electrically charged claws, it attacks the ground, sending an electric shock throughout the area.

skills.name: Heavy Thunder Tank
skills.description:
Grizzbolt's exclusive skill.
Pulls out a minigun out of nowhere and starts blasting. 
Finishes with a single, charged power shot.

skills.name: Fierce Fang (Electric)
skills.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

skills.name: Double Fang (Electric)
skills.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

skills.name: Shell Charge
skills.description:
Snock's exclusive skill.
Withdraws into its shell to reduce damage taken while building electric charge.
Once fully charged, it discharges, damaging nearby enemies.
After discharging, the Attack of this Pal's Electric skills is increased for a limited time.

skills.name: Mystic Whirlwind
skills.description:
Elphidran's exclusive skill.
Generates twin whirlwinds imbued with a mysterious power
that pursues enemies.

skills.name: Earth Dash
skills.description:
Dazemu's exclusive skill.
Accelerates all at once 
and dashes forward at high speed.

skills.name: Cloud Tempest
skills.description:
Fenglope's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while manipulating the atmosphere
to create a pressurized wind tunnel around itself.

skills.name: Thunder Tempest
skills.description:
Charges forward while manipulating the atmosphere 
and enveloping itself in thunderclouds.

skills.name: Dark Charge
skills.description:
Pyrin Noct's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while engulfed in a veil of dark flames.
Flames continue to burn in its path.

skills.name: Ignis Charge
skills.description:
Pyrin's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while engulfed in a veil of flames.
Flames continue to burn in its path.

skills.name: Blazing Horn
skills.description:
Arsox's exclusive skill.
Takes aim and charges with fierce momentum while raising its horn.

skills.name: Lightning Smash
skills.description:
Dinossom Lux's exclusive skill. 
Uses its large tail to strike the ground in front of it,
delivering a bolt of lightning in a straight line.

skills.name: Botanical Smash
skills.description:
Dinossom's exclusive skill.
Uses its large tail to strike the ground in front of it, 
delivering a shockwave in a straight line.

skills.name: Toxic Dance
skills.description:
Dandilord's exclusive skill.
Performs a dance while releasing corrosive mist.
The mist remains in the area for a limited time.

skills.name: Poison Promenade
skills.description:
Dandilord's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while sliding along the ground, spraying corrosive mist.
The mist remains in the area for a limited time.

skills.name: Fierce Fang
skills.description: Swiftly leaps at an enemy and bites into them.

skills.name: Double Fang
skills.description: Launches a rapid succession of bites at the enemy.

skills.name: Scorching Lantern Sweep
skills.description:
Ghangler Ignis's exclusive skill. 
Lashes forward with the flaming lantern atop its head, sweeping broadly ahead.

skills.name: Lantern Sweep
skills.description:
Ghangler's exclusive skill. 
Lashes forward with the lantern atop its head, sweeping broadly ahead.

skills.name: Spirit Dash
skills.description:
Maraith's exclusive skill.
While running slowly, it continuously launches flickering fireballs toward the enemy.

skills.name: Blazing Beam
skills.description:
Eidrolon's exclusive skill.
Emits a superheated light beam for a short time.
At the final moment, the targeted area is engulfed in a massive explosion.

skills.name: Tail Slash
skills.description:
Eidrolon's exclusive skill.
Closes in on the enemy at high speed to deliver a cleaving swipe with its tail.

skills.name: Fierce Fang (Ground)
skills.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

skills.name: Double Fang (Ground)
skills.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

skills.name: Crash Dash
skills.description:
Gildane's exclusive skill.
Charges forward, hurling rocks to the left and right with great force.

skills.name: Rumble Combo
skills.description:
Gorirat Terra's exclusive skill. 
Pounds the ground twice before leaping into the air
and delivers a powerful punch infused with the Power of Gaia.

skills.name: Ground Pound
skills.description:
Gorirat's exclusive skill.
Pounds the ground twice before leaping into the air
and delivers a powerful punch.

skills.name: Root Cannon
skills.description:
Dualiths exclusive skill.
Fires a Grass-elemental energy projectile from its arm.
Upon impact, the blast transforms into persistent roots that track and pierce the enemy from below.

skills.name: Dark Root
skills.description:
Dualith Nocts exclusive skill.
Fires a Dark-elemental energy projectile from its arm.
Upon impact, the blast transforms into persistent roots that track and pierce the enemy from below.

skills.name: Rocket Arm
skills.description:
Dualiths exclusive skill.
Detaches its left arm to sweep enemies, then launches its right arm.

skills.name: Earth Impact
skills.description:
Mammorest's exclusive skill. 
Uses its massive body to shake the earth, 
dealing damage over a wide area.

skills.name: Raging Bull Rush
skills.description:
Elgrove's exclusive skill.
Enters a violent frenzy and unleashes four consecutive rage-fueled Grass-element charge attacks.

skills.name: Bull Rush
skills.description:
Elgrove's exclusive skill.
Enters a wild frenzy and unleashes two consecutive Grass-element charge attacks.

skills.name: Raging Snow Rush
skills.description:
Elgrove Cryst's exclusive skill.
Enters a violent frenzy and unleashes four consecutive rage-fueled Ice-element charge attacks.

skills.name: Snow Rush
skills.description:
Elgrove Cryst's exclusive skill.
Enters a wild frenzy and unleashes two consecutive Ice-element charge attacks.

skills.name: Blast Punch
skills.description:
Mossanda Lux's exclusive skill.
Winds up its right arm before delivering an electrically charged punch.

skills.name: Crushing Punch
skills.description:
Mossanda's exclusive skill.
Winds up its right arm before striking an enemy with a devastating punch.

skills.name: Leaping Roundhouse
skills.description:
Verdash's exclusive skill.
While jumping forward, it sweeps the surroundings with a high-speed spinning kick.

skills.name: Grudge Barrage
skills.description:
Splatterina's exclusive skill.
Teleports instantly and launches a slash. It then teleports above the enemy, 
drives its weapon into them, and unleashes a wave of dark energy.

skills.name: Fierce Fang
skills.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

skills.name: Double Fang
skills.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

skills.name: Tornado Attack
skills.description:
Nitewing's exclusive skill.
Generates a tornado ahead before soaring towards its target.

skills.name: Giga Horn
skills.description:
Warsect's exclusive skill.
Skewers enemies with its four sturdy horns.

skills.name: Phoenix Flare
skills.description:
Faleris' exclusive skill.
After creating scorching tornadoes, it cloaks itself in hellfire and charges forward.

skills.name: Raging Flame Wave
skills.description:
Faleris' exclusive skill.
Generates multiple scorching tornadoes and charges forward while gliding.
The tornadoes converge in the center and eventually merge into a single massive tornado.

skills.name: Phoenix Tide
skills.description:
Faleris Aqua's exclusive skill.
After summoning a massive tornado, it envelops its body in water and charges forward.

skills.name: Chaotic Spray
skills.description:
Munchill's exclusive skill.
Coughs up three cold grenades kept undigested inside its body and lobs them at enemies.
May occasionally spit out something more dangerous...?

skills.name: Freezing Charge
skills.description:
Reindrix's exclusive skill.
Charges at an enemy with antlers adorned in ice.

skills.name: Dark Wing
skills.description:
Frostallion Noct's exclusive skill. 
Dashes forward while concentrating dark energy around its wings,
using them to slash enemies,
then converting that energy into homing shots

skills.name: Crystal Wing
skills.description:
Frostallion's exclusive skill.
Dashes forward while concentrating frigid air around its wings,
using them to slash enemies with icy blade.

skills.name: High Breach
skills.description:
Whalaska's exclusive skill.
Charges straight ahead and briefly submerges, then bursts high into the air to launch an attack.
An ice-element explosion occurs upon emerging.

skills.name: Beam Comet
skills.description:
Jetragon's exclusive skill.
Illuminates its wings and fires innumerable beams as it flies towards the enemy.
The beams explode on impact.

skills.name: Kingly Slam
skills.description:
Kingpaca's exclusive skill.
Leaps high into the air before
smashing into an enemy with its chubby, massive body.

skills.name: Frozen Press
skills.description:
Kingpaca Cryst's exclusive skill. 
Leaps high into the air before smashing into
an enemy with ice and its chubby, massive body.

skills.name: Magna Crush
skills.description:
Blazamut Ryu's exclusive skill.
After a big jump, moves at high speed in the air,
gathering strength to unleash a powerful punch.

skills.name: Brawn Impact
skills.description:
Blazamut's exclusive skill.
Raises and inflates its arms, then slams them together, 
causing a massive explosion in the surrounding area.

skills.name: Aqua Blade
skills.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Launches sharp water blades at enemies.

skills.name: Aqua Tornado
skills.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Soars into the sky and generates multiple massive tornadoes that slowly track enemies.

skills.name: Grand Breach
skills.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Dives underwater and leaps out after a short delay.
The momentum of the leap creates ripples that damage the surrounding area.

skills.name: Bubble Rain
skills.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Fires a large cluster of homing bubbles that remain in place upon landing.
Bubbles burst and deal damage upon contact or after several seconds.

skills.name: Maelstrom
skills.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Creates a vortex around the enemy. 
The vortex pulls targets toward its center while shrinking, ending in a high-pressure water pillar explosion.

skills.name: Tidal Charge
skills.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Slams the body into the enemy, generating a massive wave on impact.

skills.name: Ice Gale Strike
skills.description:
Univolt Cryst's exclusive skill.
Generates ice pillars around itself while charging toward enemies.

skills.name: Lightning Gale
skills.description:
Univolt's exclusive skill.
Generates bolts of lightning all around
while charging at its target.

skills.name: Lantern Flame
skills.description:
Loomen's exclusive skill.
Raises a lantern and summons multiple spirits that relentlessly pursue enemies.

skills.name: Konoha Flip
skills.description:
Herbil's exclusive skill.
After a brief moment of preparation,
charges at the enemy at high speed, finishing with a flip.

skills.name: Purifying Light
skills.description:
Hartalis' exclusive skill.
Leaps high into the air, condensing immense energy into a descending sphere of light.
When it strikes the ground, it purifies all on the ground below.

skills.name: Divine Wing
skills.description:
Hartalis' exclusive skill. 
Leaps back and sprouts wings of light,
then dives toward the enemy.

skills.name: Sacred Rain
skills.description:
Hartalis' exclusive skill. 
Fades from sight, then calls down a massive barrage of light pillars centered on its position.

skills.name: Bountiful Protection
skills.description:
Lyleen's exclusive skill.
Restores health to all allies within range using the power of healing.

skills.name: Wind Barrier
skills.description:
A skill exclusive to the Lilikin species.
Surround yourself with a wind barrier,
Returns the blade of wind to the attacking opponent.

skills.name: Lotus Bloom
skills.description:
Ophydia's exclusive skill.
Burrows into the ground and vanishes.
It then emerges at the surface as a flower bud, blooms, and unleashes a wide-area attack.

skills.name: Volcanic Fang
skills.description:
Blazehowl's exclusive skill.
With momentum, it pounces mercilessly on the enemy 
and causes an explosion of fire at the point of impact.

skills.name: Black Quilled Ballet
skills.description:
Solenne's exclusive skill.
Jumps diagonally and throws sharp black feathers at enemies.

skills.name: Seigetsu Flash
skills.description:
Selyne's exclusive skill.
Fires three consecutive high-speed slashes 
imbued with the power of moonlight.

skills.name: Moonlight Beam
skills.description:
Selyne's exclusive skill.
Stores energy in the moon on its back,
then fires a crescent-shaped beam forward.

skills.name: Seigetsu Blade
skills.description:
Selyne's exclusive skill.
Fires two consecutive high-speed blades
imbued with the power of moonlight.

skills.name: Giant Spore
skills.description:
Silvance's exclusive skill.
Fires a massive tracking spore that pursues enemies. 
It explodes on impact, releasing a wide-area blast.

skills.name: Spore Burst
skills.description:
Silvance's exclusive skill.
Scatters explosive spores over a wide area, 
then triggers a mass explosion after a set period of time.

skills.name: Mummy Rush
skills.description:
Gildra's exclusive skill.
Extends bandages from its hands to deliver a series of attacks.

skills.name: Soul Drain
skills.description:
Omasculs exclusive skill.
Suddenly appears near the enemy, firmly restraining them with its arms, 
and absorbs the HP of the restrained enemy.

skills.name: Cat Press
skills.description:
Grintale's exclusive skill.
Grins menacingly before leaping into the air
and smashing foes with its body.

skills.name: Lethal Step
skills.description:
Starryon's exclusive skill.
Confuses enemies with flickering steps and launches slashing attack with its sharp horn.

skills.name: Royal Step
skills.description:
Starryon Primo's exclusive skill.
Confuses enemies with an elegant stride and launches slashing attack with its sharp horn.

skills.name: Silver Steed
skills.description:
Starryon Primo's exclusive skill.
Cloaks the body in radiant flames and charges toward the enemy.

skills.name: Spectral Steed
skills.description:
Starryon's exclusive skill.
Cloaks the body in flickering flames and charges toward the enemy.

skills.name: Flame Waltz
skills.description:
Bellanoir Libero's exclusive skill.
With a graceful dance, conjuries expanding rings of fire, 
then unleashes eerie flames that seek the enemies.

skills.name: Nightmare Bloom
skills.description:
Bellanoir Libero's exclusive skill.
Disappears suddenly, then reappears while firing a barrage of beams.
The beams spread like a beautiful flower in bloom.

skills.name: Nightmare Ray
skills.description:
Bellanoir's exclusive skill.
Disappears suddenly, then reappears while firing a barrage of beams.

skills.name: Rapid Kick
skills.description:
Leafan's exclusive skill.
Rapidly delivers a series of consecutive roundhouse kicks, finishing with an engery blast.

skills.name: Punch Flurry
skills.description:
Cattiva's exclusive skill.
Chases after enemies, swinging both arms 
and delivering a flurry of punches.

skills.name: Deep Breath
skills.description:
Braloha's exclusive skill.
From the base of its long neck to the tip of its snout,
it gradually spreads the breath of grass element.

skills.name: Thalassonic Laser
skills.description:
Neptilius's exclusive skill.
Rising slightly, it gathers water at its mouth,
then sweeps a high-pressure stream vertically and horizontally three times.
Fissures form at the swept locations, erupting with water.

skills.name: Webstrike Impact
skills.description:
Tarantriss's exclusive skill.
Spits out a ball of thread, entangling the target it hits. 
Then, rushes at full speed to the trapped target and delivers three slashing strikes to finish it off.

skills.name: Spinning Staff
skills.description:
Elizabee's exclusive skill.
Channels power into its staff, and unleashes it in a whirl.

skills.name: Rush Beak
skills.description:
Ragnahawk's exclusive skill.
While flapping forward, it strikes with its beak to ignite fires in front, right, and left, causing a small explosion.

skills.name: Flower Stomp
skills.description:
Tropicaw's exclusive skill. 
Leaps lightly into the air, then forcefully slams its sharp claws into the ground.

skills.name: Focus Shot
skills.description:
Robinquill's exclusive skill.
Takes aim while drawing its bow
before releasing a powerful shot at an enemy.

skills.name: Ice Burst
skills.description:
Pierdon Cryst's exclusive skill.
Rakes the ground with its horn, then hurls a snow chunk at enemies.

skills.name: Horn Burst
skills.description:
Pierdon's exclusive skill.
Rakes the ground with its horn, then hurls a rock projectile at enemies.

skills.name: Iaigiri
skills.description:
Bushi's exclusive skill.
Taking hold of the sword, it appears in front of an enemy 
in an instant and unleashes an ultra-fast sword draw attack.

skills.name: Iaigiri
skills.description:
Bushi's exclusive skill.
Taking hold of the sword, it appears in front of an enemy 
in an instant and unleashes an ultra-fast sword draw attack.

skills.name: Spear Thrust
skills.description:
Paladius' exclusive skill.
Charges forward while enveloped in holy power with its spear thrust ahead.
The shield in its other hand blocks all attacks during the charge.

skills.name: Muscle Slam
skills.description:
Broncherry's exclusive skill.
Turns sideways before tackling enemies in front of it,
sending them flying into the air.

skills.name: Splash Tackle
skills.description:
Broncherry Aqua's exclusive skill. 
Turns sideways before tackling enemies in front of it,
sending them flying with a burst of water.

skills.name: Fierce Fang (Ground)
skills.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

skills.name: Double Fang (Ground)
skills.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

skills.name: Persistent Slash
skills.description:
Pupperai's exclusive skill.
Charges at full speed, delivering two consecutive slashes with the wooden stick held in its mouth.

skills.name: Thunder Uppercut
skills.description:
's exclusive skill.
Uses superconductivity to closes the distance to the enemy at high speed,
then swings its pincers upward with full force.

skills.name: Rolling Scratch
skills.description:
Sekhmets exclusive skill.
Spins forward to quickly close the distance and scratch the enemy.

skills.name: Somersault Scratch
skills.description:
Sekhmets exclusive skill.
Scratches the enemy while performing a backward somersault to create distance.

skills.name: Roly Poly
skills.description:
Lamball's exclusive skill. 
Curls into a ball, rolling after any enemies in its way. 
Becomes dizzy and unable to move after the attack ends.

skills.name: Wholehearted Stance
skills.description:
Dogen's exclusive skill.
Adopts an aiki stance. While in this stance, nulify any incoming attack,
instantly close in on the enemy, and counter with a full-forced palm strike.

skills.name: Poison Scatter
skills.description:
Venusa's exclusive skill. 
The snakes on her head spit toxic globs in a wide arc.
The poisonous pool left at the impact point inflicts Poison on anyone who touches it.

skills.name: Glacial Impact
skills.description:
Bastigor's exclusive skill.
Let out a mighty roar and leap into the air. Then, embed both arms into the ground to create a massive ice crack. 
Continue to channel power into the ground, ultimately causing a large explosion of ice energy

skills.name: Frost Talon
skills.description:
Bastigor's exclusive skill.
Stomps the ground, creating a fissure of ice ahead. 
Then, rapidly closes the distance and slashes with the right hand.

skills.name: Needle Spear
skills.description:
Beegarde's exclusive skill.
Charges at the enemy at high speed, delivering a final thrust with a spear.

skills.name: Trigger Happy
skills.description:
Finsider's exclusive skill.
Draws twin water blasters from its mouth, firing six shots alternately left and right,
then finishes by combining both blasters to unleash one powerful shot.

skills.name: Sumo Stomp
skills.description:
Bulldosu's exclusive skill.
Raises its right hind leg high and stomps the ground, creating a shockwave that strikes enemies in a fan-shaped area ahead.

skills.name: Hydro Spin
skills.description:
Turtacle's exclusive skill.
Uses jet-powered propulsion to spin rapidly and launch itself at the enemy.

skills.name: Glacial Plunge
skills.description:
Beakon Cryst's exclusive skill
Ice first erupts from the ground at the target's location.
Then glides forward in a rushing charge, causing ice to burst from the ground on both sides along its path.

skills.name: Lightning Dive
skills.description:
Beakon's exclusive skill.
First, it strikes the enemy's location with lightning. 
Then, while gliding forward, it drops lightning to the left and right.

skills.name: Fierce Fang (Electric)
skills.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

skills.name: Double Fang (Electric)
skills.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

skills.name: Fierce Fang (Ice)
skills.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

skills.name: Double Fang (Ice)
skills.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

skills.name: Frostcall
skills.description:
Rayhound Cryst's exclusive skill.
Generates ice pillars ahead and charges forward at high speed through the gaps between them.

skills.name: Beckon Lightning
skills.description:
Rayhound's exclusive skill.
Summons lightning one after another in front, 
then charges forward at high speed through the gaps between the falling bolts.

skills.name: Polykeraunos
skills.description:
Orserk's exclusive skill.
Summons numerous thunder spears and hurls them at the enemy.
The first spear is imbued with the power of lightning and explodes after a few seconds.

skills.name: Kerauno
skills.description:
Orserk's exclusive skill.
Summons a spear of lightning while leaping into the air
before throwing it at an enemy.

skills.name: Dash Kick
skills.description:
Palumba's exclusive skill. 
Dashes to build up speed, then launches a devastating airborne kick at its target.

skills.name: Magma Serpent
skills.description:
Jormuntide Ignis's exclusive skill.
Letting out a roar, it charges toward the enemy, 
twisting its fire-covered body as it advances.

skills.name: Slither Slam
skills.description:
Jormuntide's exclusive skill.
Letting out a roar, it charges toward the enemy, 
twisting its water-covered body as it advances.

skills.name: Frost Burst
skills.description:
Reptyro Cryst's exclusive skill.
Raises its front legs and slams them into the ground,
causing a frozen blast under its enemies.
It simultaneously bombards them with snow balls from above.

skills.name: Volcanic Burst
skills.description:
Reptyro's exclusive skill.
Raises its front legs and slams them into the ground,
causing a volcanic eruptions under its enemies.
It simultaneously bombards them with volcanic bombs from above.

skills.name: Ice Laser
skills.description:
Moldron Cryst's exclusive skill.
Fires a freezing beam from the mouth that coats the ground in ice.
Frozen ground forms frost pools that freeze and damage enemies on contact.

skills.name: Ice Spit
skills.description:
Moldron Cryst's exclusive skill.
Spits a chunk of ice from its mouth.
The impact creates frost pools that freeze and damage enemies on contact.

skills.name: Magma Spit
skills.description:
Moldron's exclusive skill.
Spits a mass of magma from its mouth.
The impact creates magma pools that damage enemies on contact.

skills.name: Magma Laser
skills.description:
Moldron's exclusive skill.
Emits a thermal beam from its mouth that scorches the ground.
Heated ground forms magma pools that damage enemies on contact.

skills.name: Rocket Slam
skills.description:
Chillet's exclusive skill.
Gathers a bit of strength and leaps forward.
Always shuts its eyes tight in fear when landing.

skills.name: Snow Claw
skills.description:
's exclusive skill.
Leaps forward and attacks twice with vicious claws
imbued with ice element.

skills.name: Jumping Claw
skills.description:
's exclusive skill.
Leaps forward and attacks twice with vicious claws
imbued with dark energy.

skills.name: Dark Nova
skills.description:
Celesdir Noct's exclusive skill.
After igniting a burst of darkness across a vast area ahead, it strides forward, generating pillars of darkness around itself.

skills.name: Holy Nova
skills.description:
Celesdir's exclusive skill.
After igniting a burst of holy light across a vast area ahead, 
it strides forward, radiating holy light around itself.

skills.name: Aegis Charge
skills.description:
Silvegis's exclusive skill.
Deploys a shield in front that reduces all types of attacks, then charges forward, crushing the enemy.

skills.name: Stone Claw
skills.description:
Cryolinx Terra's exclusive skill.
First, it strikes with its claws, followed by a second slash, and culminates with a powerful slash using its entire body.
When swinging the claws, rocks are launched forward in a fan shape.

skills.name: Blizzard Claw
skills.description:
Cryolinx's exclusive skill.
First, it strikes with its claws, followed by a second slash, and culminates with a powerful slash using its entire body.
When swinging the claws, ice pillars are launched forward in a fan shape.

skills.name: Flame Cutter
skills.description:
Knocklem Ignis's exclusive skill.
Takes a big swing and throws the flaming ring from its back.
The ring flies in a circular trajectory.

skills.name: Ground Cutter
skills.description:
Knocklem's exclusive skill.
Takes a big swing and throws the ring from its back.
The ring flies in a circular trajectory.

skills.name: Lock-On Lunge
skills.description:
Eye of Cthulhu's exclusive skill. 
Repeatedly charges at the enemy.

skills.name: Frenzied Charge
skills.description:
Eye of Cthulhu's exclusive skill. 
Repeatedly charges at the enemy at high speed.

skills.name: Servant Call
skills.description:
Eye of Cthulhu's exclusive skill. 
Summons four Servants that charge at enemies to deal damage. 
Servants disappear after taking damage or after a short time.

skills.name: Ocular Rush
skills.description:
Demon Eye's exclusive skill. 
Charges at the enemy, bouncing off the ground or walls on impact.

skills.name: Slime Press (Dark)
skills.description:
Purple Slime's exclusive skill. 
Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.

skills.name: Slime Press (Fire)
skills.description:
Red Slime's exclusive skill. 
Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.

skills.name: Slime Press (Grass)
skills.description:
Green Slime's exclusive skill. 
Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.

skills.name: Slime Press (Neutral)
skills.description:
Illuminant Slime's exclusive skill. 
Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.

skills.name: Slime Press (Rainbow)
skills.description:
Rainbow Slime's exclusive skill. 
Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.

skills.name: Slime Press (Water)
skills.description:
Blue Slime's exclusive skill. 
Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.

skills.name: Sword Charge
skills.description:
Enchanted Sword's exclusive skill. 
Lunges forward to deliver a sharp thrust.

skills.name: Winged Assault
skills.description:
Cave Bat's exclusive skill. 
Using its whole body, it lunges at the enemy, bouncing off the ground or walls on impact.

skills.name: Lawn Bowling
skills.description:
Wumpo Botan's exclusive skill.
Rolls a ball made of grass as it moves forward, and when it grows large enough, 
it throws it to cause an explosion.

skills.name: Snow Bowling
skills.description:
Wumpo's exclusive skill.
Rolls a snowball as it moves forward, and when it grows large enough, 
it throws it to cause an explosion.

skills.name: Curtain Splash
skills.description: Continously creates walls made from water columns at the enemy's location.

skills.name: Aqua Burst
skills.description:
Creates a giant ball of water
and hurls it at an enemy.

skills.name: Aqua Gun
skills.description:
Hurls a ball of water
straight at an enemy.

skills.name: Use Weapon
skills.description: Attack with held weapon.

skills.name: Wind Burst
skills.description: Summons a massive wind vortex around itself and unleashes a powerful attack.

skills.name: Wind Cutter
skills.description:
Fires a high speed blade of wind
that flies straight at an enemy.

skills.name: Wind Edge
skills.description: Launches sharp blades of air that fan out.
